title: rohdea japonica var. japonica
intro: Rohdea japonica var. japonica, also known as the Japanese Sacred Lily or Tuberous Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in China and Japan, where its rhizome is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as having antioxidant and anti-aging effects. Rohdea japonica var. japonica can be prepared into herbal medicines, including decoctions, infusions, and dried rhizomes, which are used in traditional folk medicine and modern herbal remedies.
